meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't monetize skills. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Monetize Your Skills (Advanced Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to monetize your coding skills. Master AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade software today.
content.answer_block: Monetizing skills requires delivering bug-free, production-ready features rapidly. By leveraging AI-assisted debugging, you eliminate the 'tutorial hell' bottleneck. Use Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based fixing to transform your buggy prototypes into marketable SaaS products that generate real-world revenue for your portfolio.
content.intro:
You’ve spent hundreds of hours in the IDE, yet your projects remain dormant in private repositories. The gap between 'knowing how to code' and 'shipping a product that users pay for' isn't just effort—it's the ability to squash complex bugs at lightning speed. When your code breaks, your momentum dies, and your monetization potential evaporates.

But the era of manual, hour-long stack trace analysis is over. By integrating AI into your debugging workflow, you stop being a student who struggles with syntax and become an engineer who orchestrates solutions. We are going to turn your technical debt into a competitive advantage using the power of Antigravity and Claude Code.

steps.title: Architectural Audit with Antigravity
steps.description: Before fixing bugs, identify the structural weaknesses that cause them. Use Antigravity to map your dependency graph and identify circular logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this repository. Identify circular dependencies and high-complexity modules that are likely causing runtime instability.

steps.title: Automated Trace Root-Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed your error logs directly into Claude Code to get a non-hallucinated diagnosis of the failure state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Interpret the following stack trace and explain the underlying architectural failure, not just the symptom.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze this error log and suggest a fix that follows SOLID principles'

steps.title: Iterative Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Prevent regression by forcing AI to write the test suite before the fix is applied.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust Vitest suite for the broken module that covers edge cases including null pointers and race conditions.

steps.title: Context-Aware Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix across the entire codebase to ensure your changes don't break secondary integrations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified module to resolve the race condition while maintaining existing interface contracts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude modify --file src/services/auth.ts --instruction 'Apply the fix identified in the audit'

steps.title: Production Deployment Validation
steps.description: Verify your fix in a simulated production environment before pushing to main.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Simulate a high-concurrency request load on the refactored module to confirm the bug is permanently resolved.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm run build && npm run start:test'

pro_tips: Always provide your 'package.json' as context to Claude Code to prevent hallucinated library usage.
Use Antigravity to detect 'dead code'—removing unused files often solves mysterious runtime bugs.
When debugging, ask the AI to explain the 'why' behind the fix, not just the code change; this is how you build senior-level intuition.
Keep your Claude Code sessions scoped to a single feature file to avoid context window pollution.
Treat every bug fix as a documentation opportunity; use the AI to write the commit message explaining the architectural lesson learned.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your core module, deploy your app to Vercel or Railway and share the live link in our community showcase to get feedback from other builders.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to turn broken code into a profitable asset. Stop letting bugs dictate your career trajectory and start shipping features that matter. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
